description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized male figure dressed in work attire, including a cap and rolled-up sleeves, standing behind an anvil set atop a sturdy base. The man appears to be a blacksmith, holding a hammer in one hand and poised as if about to strike the anvil. The figure's posture and detailed clothing folds convey a sense of realism and craftsmanship. The anvil and base are robust and solid, suggesting the tools of a traditional blacksmith's trade. The entire sculpture is rendered in a uniform, dark metallic tone, giving it a cohesive and industrial appearance. The surface texture is slightly rough, enhancing the sense of age and labor associated with the subject.
description: A life-sized metallic sculpture of a blacksmith standing behind an anvil, holding a hammer, with detailed work attire and a rugged, industrial finish.
description_view_0: The blacksmith is seen in profile, with his right side visible, holding a hammer over the anvil and his face partially turned forward.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the back of the blacksmith, highlighting the folds of his shirt and pants, and the full width of the anvil's horn.
description_view_2: The left profile reveals the blacksmith's left arm and the side of the anvil, with the hammer poised above the anvil's surface.
description_view_3: The front view centers on the blacksmith's face, both hands on the hammer, and the anvil directly in front, emphasizing the act of forging.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure of a blacksmith at work with an anvil and hammer
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
